name: Struggling Candidate (Easy)
description: Tests that Easy difficulty provides multiple specific prompts when candidate struggles
inputs: Hmm, I'm not really sure. What is this?
I think maybe some blood tests? I'm not sure which ones.
Um, antibiotics maybe? I don't know which ones specifically.
I think they probably need surgery but I'm not sure what kind.

assertions.desc: Easy: AI uses multiple specific prompts to help struggling candidate
